sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64228" key="lusifa/rmakon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῡσῐ-φάρμᾰκον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n64228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remedy against spells, PMag.Osl.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:178" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.178</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
